title: Apartment for rent
description:
🏡 Lease Takeover – Beautiful 2 Bedroom Apartment in the Heart of Payson, UT! Available April 1st

Looking for someone to take over my lease starting April 1st through June 30th, with the option to renew after that.

✨ Location: Prime spot in downtown Payson — walking distance to restaurants, shops, and everything you need!

🛏 2 Bedrooms
🛁 1 Bathroom
🍽 Spacious kitchen
🛋 Large living room
🧺 Washer & Dryer included

The apartment comes fully equipped with a gas stove, refrigerator, and microwave — everything you need and all in excellent condition.

This apartment is practically new and very well maintained. It’s located in a very safe area and features a secure electronic keypad entry lock for added peace of mind.

Perfect for a small family, couple, or professionals looking for comfort and convenience in a great location.

📅 Lease takeover: April 1 – June 30
🔁 Option to renew lease available

Message me for more details or to schedule a showing!

title: Apartment - The Brittany
description:
The Brittany is an amazing apartment! It’s a shared bedroom! I’m moving out in April to live with some friends. I’ll pay for April’s rent for you as well. Good roommates as well. I know the guy I’m rooming with will be gone in August when the lease ends. So that means an open spot for one of your friends!!

Rent is around $430-$450 and plus utilities which  ranges between $40-$60. So a super cheap place to live at. It’s about a 10 minute walk to BYU campus. Ward is really awesome! I’m trying to move out before April 1st so anyone can move in after March 30th! Also that TV in the picture isn’t mine but I’m also leaving my TV behind for free as well!! 

Reach out if you have any questions!!

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Townhouse
description:
Private Room Available Near BYU & UVU (Female)

Hi! I’m looking for a female student interested in a private, furnished room starting in April, with flexibility to move in sooner.

The apartment is about 10 minutes from both BYU and UVU and close to the freeway. It’s a quiet, friendly place that’s been great for student living.

Details:
 • Private furnished bedroom (queen bed and dresser)
 • Shared bathroom with two other female roommates
 • In-unit washer and dryer
 • Half bathroom on the main floor
 • Free street parking

I’ve loved living here and am only moving because I’m getting married. The roommates, ward, and landlord have all been great.

If you’re interested, please comment or message me and I can share more information or set up a tour.
